name: hapi-desktop

scripts.dev: bun run build:main && concurrently -k "vite --config vite.config.ts --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist/main/index.js"
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run build:main && bun run build:renderer
scripts.build:main: vite build --config vite.main.config.ts && vite build --config vite.preload.config.ts
scripts.build:win: bun run build && cross-env HAPI_DESKTOP_CLI_PLATFORM=win32 bun run prepare:cli && bun run patch:portable-template && electron-builder --win portable && bun run patch:win-metadata
scripts.build:win:fast: bun run build && cross-env HAPI_DESKTOP_CLI_PLATFORM=win32 bun run prepare:cli && electron-builder --win dir && bun run patch:win-metadata
scripts.build:mac: bun run build && cross-env HAPI_DESKTOP_CLI_PLATFORM=darwin bun run prepare:cli && electron-builder --mac dir
scripts.package:win:prebundled: bun run build && bun run patch:portable-template && electron-builder --win portable && bun run patch:win-metadata

description: Desktop launcher for HAPI Hub and Runner
author: HAPI contributors
